mechanics.excerpt: If they lost, the Clans would halt their advance for fifteen years_ Unknown t0 the Precentor Martial, Waterly also set secret plans in motion t0 strike at the Clans and the Inner Sphere simultaneously while the battle for Tukayyid raged The Com Guards defeated the Clans on Tukayyid May of 3052, in horrific bloodbath that cost ComStar" forces dearly: While the Com Guards were fighting ad dying on Tukayyid to save the Inner Sphere, Primus Waterly gave the go ahead her agents, They launched Operation Scorpion series of covert attacks on worlds in the Clan Occupation Zones and com munications sites across the Inner Sphere.
